name: KrillApp.Server.Pin
title: GPIO Pin
description: Controls a GPIO pin on a Raspberry Pi via Pi4J. Supports output mode (set HIGH/LOW), input mode (read), and PWM mode. When executed in output mode, sets the pin state and triggers downstream nodes. Registers and configures the pin with Pi4J on creation or edit. Allows configuring startup and shutdown states.
shortDescription: Controls a Raspberry Pi GPIO pin with configurable mode, state, and startup/shutdown behavior.
llmPurpose: Controls a physical GPIO pin on a Raspberry Pi, setting it HIGH or LOW, reading its state, or configuring PWM output.
llmBehavior: registers pin with Pi4J on creation
sets pin HIGH or LOW in output mode
reads pin state in input mode
triggers downstream nodes on state change
configures startup and shutdown pin states
llmOutputs: downstream node execution on state change
llmCreationHints: Create a Pin node to control a specific GPIO pin on a Raspberry Pi. Requires a pin number (BCM address) and mode (OUT for output, IN for input). Configure initial and shutdown states as needed.

llmConnectionHints.role: leaf target node that directly controls physical hardware

llmExamples: Set this relay pin to HIGH at startup and LOW at shutdown.
Toggle this LED on and off.
Read the state of this digital input pin.
